note: Role-scoped synergy partners from lol_get_champion_analysis; rows are data.synergies.jungle[].
anchor: Nocturne is absent in the jungle partner list; this is the unrelated-control fixture.

content.text:
class LolGetChampionAnalysis: data
class Data: synergies
class Synergies: jungle
class Jungle: champion_id,champion_name,position,synergy_champion_id,synergy_champion_name,synergy_position,score_rank,score,play,win,win_rate,synergy_tier_data
class SynergyTierData: tier,rank,rank_prev,rank_prev_patch

LolGetChampionAnalysis(Data(Synergies([Jungle(127,"Lissandra","MID",64,"Lee Sin","JUNGLE",1,0,2525,1412,0.56,SynergyTierData(0,1,1,1)),Jungle(127,"Lissandra","MID",62,"Wukong","JUNGLE",9,0,581,318,0.55,SynergyTierData(2,11,11,34)),Jungle(127,"Lissandra","MID",5,"Xin Zhao","JUNGLE",2,0,1392,751,0.54,SynergyTierData(1,3,3,3))])))
